title: PAI: The Life OS for AI-Powered Development
summary: PAI (Personal AI Infrastructure) is a Life OS built on Claude Code that gives AI agents persistent memory of project architecture, coding standards, decisions, and workflows across sessions. It includes a Pulse dashboard and seven-phase algorithm for observe-think-plan-build-execute-verify-learn cycles.
writeup: The video covers PAI (Personal AI Infrastructure), a Life OS built on Claude Code that adds persistent memory, custom skills, structured workflows, and a dashboard to keep context across AI development sessions. It addresses a core limitation of agent-based coding: losing state between sessions. The central mechanism is a seven-phase algorithm guiding AI agents to observe, think, plan, build, execute, verify, and learn through a development workflow.
